evals.prompt: Please review the Rust code in simple-crate library src/lib.rs for code quality, correctness, documentation, and formatting.
evals.expected_output: Agent triggers rust-code-review skill, checks project context and automated tools (cargo fmt, cargo clippy, cargo test), evaluates code correctness, docs, naming, complexity, and project structure, and produces a structured Rust Code Review Report with findings categorized by severity.

Agent triggers rust-code-review skill, identifies LLM code smells (cargo-culted Arc<Mutex>, excessive .clone(), manual indexing instead of iterator, unhandled unwrap/panic risk, trailing comma), and provides refactoring recommendations with code examples.
